raw_text: beltrán segurado martín 693 filton avenue bs34 7la, bristol, uk +34 628136584 beltran.segurado04@gmail.com profile am a 20-year-old final year student of aerospace engineering at uwe bristol. consider myself a responsible, eagel-eyed individual with proactive problem-solving skills, leadership experience, strong teamwork commitment, and an international and multicultural perspective gained through education in spain, the uk, and the us. with 2 native languages (spanish and english) as well as basic french level and a wide range of technical knowledge in mathematics, engineering and programming. in addition to my engineering background, my personality, curiosity and ambition have driven me to expand my knowledge beyond technical fields, with extra-curricular interests in motorsport engineering (formula student), business, management and entrepreneurship. moreover, my industry experience expands to real world scenarios, highlighting my role in aircraft economics (business models) and technical aircraft design in my 3 year aerospace group design project in collaboration with airbus, or my participation in the engineering for people uk competition. education 8. qualifications beng aerospace engineering with pilot studies - university of the west of england, bristol (uwe) e academic performance: first class with honours (70.10%) e year: 06/22 07/25 (three-year full-time study) e key modules and achievements: o achieved a first class with honours across multiple modules including structural mechanics, fundamental aerodynamics and propulsion, flight, aerospace thermofluids and aerospace systems design among others o successfully completing advanced modules such as further aero-propulsion (achieving the highest mark in the year in the in-person exam) or further aerodynamics and aerospace group design project (agdp) in partnership and collaboration with airbus as well as my final year project. o design & computational software's: matlab, simulink, stk12, gasturb, solidworks, excel, ansys cfd, python or ibm spss o mathematics, physics, engineering and economics o other relevant skills like leadership, teamwork, project management, team building and risk assessments & mitigations e key projects o computational fluid dynamics (cfd) testing of a specific air foil, to study flow properties around the body o re-design of boeing b52 stratofortress engines during our fundamental aero propulsion module. o design and analysis of a regional aircraft's fuel management system with the use of matlab, simulink and stk. o hands in experience at subsonic and supersonic wind tunnel labs o the publication of my final year project an empirical analysis of airline selection among uwe bristol students: exploring the synergy between loyalty programs, price sensitivity and other key influencing factors using data analysis tools like inbm spss o strategic fleet planning in modern airlines: balancing airline economics, regulatory frameworks, and sustainability considerations as part of my pilot and airline operations module. o aircraft conceptual design and aircraft operating economics role on our truss-braced concept for aerospace group design project (agdp) in collaboration with airbus. page 1 spanish baccalaureate general certificate of education (gcse) - colegio parque (madrid, spain) e
